title: Position
description: A position representing holdings of a specific security within a Bloomberg AIM portfolio, including quantity, valuation, and analytics.

portfolioId.description: Identifier of the portfolio holding this position

ticker.description: Bloomberg ticker of the security held

assetClass.description: Asset class of the held security

quantity.description: Number of shares, contracts, or units held (negative for short positions)

costBasis.description: Total cost basis of the position in local currency

marketValue.description: Current market value of the position (quantity x market price)

marketValueBase.description: Market value converted to portfolio base currency

localCurrency.description: Local trading currency of the security (ISO 4217)

fxRate.description: Exchange rate from local currency to portfolio base currency

weight.description: Position weight as percentage of total portfolio market value

unrealizedPnL.description: Unrealized profit or loss on the position

realizedPnL.description: Realized profit or loss from closed portions

unrealizedPnLPercent.description: Unrealized P&L as a percentage of cost basis

dailyPnL.description: Profit or loss for the current trading day

accruedInterest.description: Accrued interest for fixed income positions

yield.description: Current yield for fixed income positions

duration.description: Modified duration for fixed income positions

creditRating.description: Credit rating for fixed income positions

beta.description: Beta of the security relative to the benchmark

tradeDate.description: Date the position was initiated or last traded

settleDate.description: Settlement date for the most recent trade

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last position update
